---
title: "End-to-End Stochastic Predict-Then-Optimize for Cost-Efficient Water-Energy Resource Scheduling"
authors:
  - "Shunyu Wu"
  - "J. Wang"
  - "H. Xu"
  - "et al."
year: 2025
venue: "IEEE Transactions on Smart Grid"
status: "published"
type: "first-author"
doi: "10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238"
url: "https://doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238"
keywords:
  - "decision-focused learning"
  - "predict-then-optimize"
  - "water-energy systems"
selected: true
toc: false
---

**Status:** Published  
**DOI:** [10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238](https://doi.org/10.1109/TSG.2025.3601238)

This work develops an end-to-end stochastic PtO framework for coupled water-energy scheduling with measurable cost and efficiency gains.
